subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath turned towards God and desireth to drink from the Kawthar of Life from the hand of his Lord's bounty, the All-Giving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من توجه الی الله و اراد ان یشرب کوثر الحیوان من ید عطاء ربه المعطی
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
